title: Are Aliens Coming to Earth This Year? Baba Vanga's Prophecy Resurfaces After Donald Trump UFO Order
description: Donald Trump's call to release UFO and 'alien' records has reignited an old internet obsession: Baba Vanga's alleged prediction that 2026 brings first contact.

title: Baba Vanga's 2026 alien contact prophecy resurfaces as Trump makes UFO disclosure
description: The blind mystic's chilling prediction that 2026 will be the year humans finally meet aliens has resurfaced after Donald Trump ordered the release of government UFO files

title: Why Did Trump Suddenly Order the Pentagon to Declassify UFO and Alien Files? 'Tremendous Interest' Sparked Major Release

title: Trump orders US agencies to release UFO records amid public interest
description: President Trump directs US federal agencies to release government files on UFOs and aliens, citing strong public interest and ongoing Pentagon investigations.The post Trump orders US agencies to release UFO records amid public interest first appeared on The Journal Record.

title: Baba Vanga's terrifying UFO prophecy comes to light following Donald Trump's alien disclosure
description: Donald Trump has ordered the declassification of top secret UFO files, sparking fears that a terrifying Baba Vanga prophecy is about to come true
